name: io.github.Vortiago/mcp-outline
title: Outline MCP Server
description: Connect AI assistants to Outline for document search, reading, and management

environmentVariables.name: OUTLINE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Outline API key (Settings > API). Can also be set in ~/.config/mcp-outline/.env

environmentVariables.name: OUTLINE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Outline API URL for self-hosted instances
